chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 508 of 2010 Date Order with Signature of Judge For final arguments 19.05.2023 Mr.Hasan Arif, Advocate for Defendants ---------- Counsel for the Defendants submits Objections on behalf of the Defendants against referral of this matter for mediation. The same are taken on record. One of the objections taken by the Defendants is regarding the cost of mediators. Mediators referred by this Court are being handled by the Court Annexed Mediation Centers on pro-bono basis. Mr.Hussain holding brief for Mrs. Rukhsana Ahmed, Counsel for the Plaintiff, submits that she is unable to attend hearing on account of strike called by the Advocates today. Requests for a short date. Request granted. By consent, adjourned to 24.05.2023 at 1.30 p.m. J U D G E Ashraf
